fact_nuggets.text: Strong Jaw (Japanese: Strong Jaw) is an Ability introduced in Generation VI.
Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S MD Moves using jaws or fangs become more powerful! MD RT DX Moves using jaws or fangs, such as Bite or Fire Fang, become more powerful.

Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Affected moves 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Strong Jaw increases the power of the Pokemon's biting moves by 50%. Affected moves [ edit | edit source ] The table below lists the moves affected by Strong Jaw, as well as the Pokemon that can have Strong Jaw and learn those moves. Move Type Cat. Power and Boost Learned by Bite Dark Physical 60 90 Crunch Dark Physical 80 120 Fire Fang Fire Physical 65 97.5 Fishious Rend Water Physical 85 127.5 Hyper Fang Normal Physical 80 120 Ice Fang Ice Physical 65 97.5 Jaw Lock Dark Physical 80 120 Poison Fang Poison Physical 50 75 Psychic Fangs Psychic Physical 85 127.5 Thunder Fang Electric Physical 65 97.5 Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Strong Jaw has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] Strong Jaw increases the power of the Pokemon's biting moves by 50%. Affected moves [ edit | edit source ] The table below lists the moves affected by Strong Jaw, as well as the Pokemon that can have Strong Jaw and learn those moves. Move Type Cat. Power and Boost Learned by Bite Dark Physical 60 90 Crunch Dark Physical 80 120 Fire Fang Fire Physical 65 97.5 Fishious Rend Water Physical 85 127.5 Hyper Fang Normal Physical 80 120 Ice Fang Ice Physical 65 97.5 Jaw Lock Dark Physical 80 120 Poison Fang Poison Physical 50 75 Psychic Fangs Psychic Physical 85 127.5 Thunder Fang Electric Physical 65 97.5
Strengthens biting moves to 1.5 their power.
